description: Expanded detail on the 'big' multi-service clouds, since each spans compute, storage, databases, and more under one free-tier umbrella.

entries.name: AWS Free Tier — Compute & Storage Bundle
entries.summary: AWS bundles dozens of always-free and 12-month-free service allowances across EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, and DynamoDB.
entries.freeTier: 750 EC2 hrs/month (12mo), 5GB S3 (12mo), 750 RDS hrs/month (12mo), 1M Lambda requests/month (always-free), 25GB DynamoDB (always-free).
entries.notes: Distinguish 'always free' services from '12 months free' services — many people get billed unexpectedly after month 12.

entries.name: Google Cloud Free Program
entries.summary: Combines an always-free tier (small but permanent) with a one-time $300 trial credit for 90 days.
entries.freeTier: 1 e2-micro VM, 5GB Cloud Storage, 2M Cloud Functions invocations/month always-free; $300 credit for new accounts.

entries.name: Microsoft Azure Free Account
entries.summary: Mix of always-free service quotas (25+ services) plus a $200 credit for the first 30 days.
entries.freeTier: 1 B1S VM (12mo), 1M Azure Functions executions/month (always-free), 5GB Blob + 5GB File storage (12mo), $200 trial credit.

entries.name: Oracle Cloud Always Free
entries.summary: OCI's always-free tier is unusually generous and has no 12-month expiration on its core compute offer.
entries.freeTier: 4 Arm Ampere A1 cores + 24GB RAM (split across up to 4 VMs), 2 AMD E2.1.Micro VMs, 200GB block storage, 10TB egress/month, all permanently free.
entries.notes: Often cited as the best free always-on compute available from any major cloud provider.

entries.name: IBM Cloud Lite
entries.summary: IBM's Lite plans apply across dozens of services (Kubernetes, Cloud Functions, Watson AI, Cloudant) with no time limit, just usage caps.
entries.freeTier: Lite tier limits vary per service but never expire by time, only by usage quota.

entries.name: Cloudflare Free Plan
entries.summary: Cloudflare's free plan spans DNS, CDN, DDoS protection, SSL, Workers, Pages, and R2 storage under one umbrella.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited DNS-protected domains, free SSL, 100k Workers requests/day, 500 Pages builds/month, 10GB R2 storage/month.

entries.name: Zoho Suite (Catalyst, Mail, Assist, Sprints)
entries.summary: Zoho's developer-relevant free tiers span PaaS (Catalyst), email, remote support (Assist), and project tracking (Sprints).
entries.freeTier: Catalyst PaaS generous free tier; Mail free for 5 users (5GB/user); Assist free for 1 concurrent session; Sprints free for 5 users/5 projects/500MB.
